creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of security/p5-Crypt-Lite,
>
> Please note that PR ports/103360 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103360
>
>   
Since then a newer release is out, so I just submitted a patch for that. 
Thanks, anyway.

-- 
Cheers,

Gabor
